name: sanctum
description: Sanctum monorepo — a fully-offline, long-context private records analyst built on the QVAC SDK. Tether QVAC 'Unleash Edge AI' hackathon (Track: General Purpose). apps/server (on-device inference server) + apps/mobile (Expo app). Each app is a SELF-CONTAINED install — npm workspaces are intentionally NOT used because Expo/React Native breaks under dependency hoisting.

scripts.postinstall: cd apps/server && npm install && cd ../mobile && npm install
scripts.start: trap 'kill 0' EXIT; ( cd apps/server && npm run serve ) > sanctum-server.log 2>&1 & echo 'Sanctum server starting in the background → logs: sanctum-server.log' && cd apps/mobile && npx expo start
scripts.//mobile:android: disabled — run `npm run mobile`, then press 'a' in Expo (or `cd apps/mobile && npx expo start --android`).
scripts.//mobile:ios: disabled — run `npm run mobile`, then press 'i' in Expo (or `cd apps/mobile && npx expo start --ios`).
